response.justification: Strong individual contributor with 15+ years of polyglot engineering experience, deep testing/TDD culture, and developer-tooling adjacent work (CI/CD setup, test runners, Selenium courses, MCP code generators). However, the role requires a Software Engineering Manager with 2+ years of formal people management and 3+ years in a technical leadership role, and the resume shows no explicit people-management experience, no direct reports, no mobile-platform ecosystem work at scale, and no demonstrated roadmap/org-leadership track record. The fit is closer to a Staff IC than an Engineering Manager.
strengths: Deep developer-tooling background: built test runners (Trial), assertion libraries (Fluent-Asserts), CI/CD pipelines, and taught TDD/Selenium courses
15+ years of hands-on polyglot engineering with strong testing and craftsmanship discipline
Founder of GISCollective and multiple OSS projects — shows initiative, ownership, and ability to drive technical direction
concerns: No explicit people-management experience or direct reports listed — fails the 2-year people-management minimum
No mobile-platform ecosystem experience (iOS/Android tooling at scale); brief iOS/Apple TV work at WatchUp is dated and small-scope
No evidence of leading organizational change, setting team roadmaps, or running performance/1:1 cycles
